title: Coverage Gap
description: Emitted by deterministic coverage verifiers in Phase 1 (Sub-Phase 1.3c for journey/workflow coverage, Sub-Phase 1.8 verifier for release-manifest coverage) when a structural assertion fails. Routes to an MMP card where the human chooses between 'accepted_as_scope_cut' (the gap is intentional; recorded in the handoff as an explicit exclusion) or 'rebloom_requested' (targeted re-run of the preceding sub-phase with the gap as human_feedback). Severity 'blocking' pauses phase progression until resolved; severity 'advisory' logs the gap but does not block.

assertion.description: One-line description of the structural rule that tripped.

details.description: Optional structured details the MMP card or re-bloom prompt may render.

expected.description: Artifact ids that should have been covered by the rule.

actual.description: Artifact ids that were actually covered.

missing.description: expected ∖ actual — ids the rule requires but did not find.

extra.description: actual ∖ expected — only populated for exclusivity/double-count checks.
